meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome the barrier of basic apps. A beginner-friendly guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are building isolated scripts rather than integrated systems. The Antigravity template provides a production-grade architecture that bridges the gap between 'tutorial code' and 'real-world SaaS'. By combining Antigravity’s structural boilerplate with Claude Code’s iterative logic, you instantly elevate your development workflow to professional standards.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, but your code feels hollow. You've followed a dozen tutorials, yet every project you build stays trapped in the 'beginner' phase—disconnected, buggy, and impossible to scale. You are not failing as a developer; you are simply missing the scaffolding that separates hobbyist scripts from professional-grade software.

Today, we break that cycle. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, we are moving beyond simple logic into the realm of robust, modular architecture. This is the moment your portfolio transforms from a list of exercises into a showcase of engineering competence.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces clean separation of concerns, ensuring your code remains maintainable as it grows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard boilerplate, including the base configuration for environment variables and logging.

steps.title: Define Core Business Logic
steps.description: Abstract your primary application logic into modular services so that your main entry point stays clean and readable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for my core feature, ensuring dependency injection is handled according to the Antigravity pattern.

steps.title: Configure Data Persistence
steps.description: Set up the database schema and repository patterns to ensure your app handles state reliably without spaghetti code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database repository schema for my data models using the Antigravity database abstraction layer.

steps.title: Implement API Endpoints
steps.description: Use the built-in routing templates to expose your services to the outside world with built-in validation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for the new services, applying standard middleware for error handling and logging.

steps.title: Deploy and Test Iteration
steps.description: Run the automated test suite and prepare for the initial deployment to validate your architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the integrated test suite and identify any potential bottlenecks in the current architecture.

pro_tips: Always use the 'Service-Repository' pattern; it makes swapping out databases or APIs trivial later.
Treat your environment variables as code; keep a template file updated so your team can replicate your setup instantly.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep context on your project's architectural constraints across multiple sessions.
Prioritize logging early; if you can't trace the error, you haven't built a real application yet.
Keep your functions under 20 lines of code to force modular thinking and easier unit testing.
content.next_steps: Once the foundation is set, focus on integrating a third-party API like Stripe or OpenAI to make your project functional and impressive for employers.
content.conversion_block: Stop building apps that go nowhere and start building a career that thrives on professional-grade engineering. The industry is waiting for developers who know how to structure their vision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
